# PHIL.062 ? Marxism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** marxism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Historical materialism; class struggle; alienation under capitalism; dialectical materialism; revolutionary praxis

## Application
Analyze through class relations; recognize material conditions shaping consciousness; critique ideology; revolutionary change; praxis over theory alone

## Key Values
- Material conditions
- Class analysis
- Revolutionary change
- Praxis
